name: Terraform / OpenTofu

naming.description: Input variables must use TF_VAR_ prefix. Built-in Terraform vars use TF_ prefix (TF_LOG, TF_INPUT, etc.).

limits.notes: No Terraform-specific limits. Subject to OS env var limits. Complex types (maps, lists) must be JSON-encoded.

notes: TF_VAR_<name> sets input variable <name>. Sensitive vars should use 'sensitive = true' in variable declarations. Consider .tfvars files for non-secret defaults and Vault for secrets.
